deterministicRationale: 1 HIGH (grounding) + 1 MEDIUM (reasoning_quality) → REVISE per harness decision policy
overallAssessment: The presence of a HIGH grounding finding regarding unsupported persona attributes mandates a REVISE decision. The MEDIUM reasoning-quality finding about unjustified inference leaps further supports revision, since the agent made claims about persona attributes and pain points that are not directly supported by the source material. A rerun with explicit instruction to restrict outputs to source-verifiable content is recommended.
